mapper.insert:
select last_insert_id()
insert into member ( mem_number, mem_name, mem_pwd, mem_sex, mem_birthday, province_id, city_id, address, role_id, mem_state, remarks) values (#{memNumber}, #{memName}, #{memPwd}, #{memSex}, #{memBirthday}, #{provinceId}, #{cityId}, #{address}, 3, 1, #{remarks})
mapper.update:
update member
mem_number = #{memNumber},
mem_pwd = #{memPwd},
mem_sex = #{memSex},
mem_birthday = #{memBirthday},
province_id = #{provinceId},
city_id = #{cityId},
address = #{address},
verify_Code = #{verifyCode},
remarks = #{remarks},
code_time = #{codeTime},
mem_name = #{memName},
where mem_id = #{memId}
mapper.select: select * from member where mem_number = #{ logInID }
